summary: The posts report a series of specific drone-related incidents and developments. On March 23, 2026, the Rubikon Center claimed 94 enemy targets destroyed in operations across Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman. A new Ukrainian fixed-wing drone, the Klin, was intercepted; it carries up to 5 kg of payload, has a 120 km range, and uses advanced Li-AFB batteries. Russian anti-drone system "Elka" successfully intercepted Ukrainian drones "Maya" and "Darts" via kinetic impact, causing onboard charges to detonate. An airstrike targeted a Ukrainian drone launch point and air defense system in Krasnoyaskoye, DNR. FPV drone footage showed a Russian Ka-52 being downed near Nadiivka, with additional strikes on the crew during evacuation. Other posts noted tactical developments, including Ukrainian FPV pilots targeting dismounted Russian troops and a reported first instance of a Russian soldier charging an FPV drone with a bayonet and losing.
